description: Slow Rising Squishy Butter Squeeze Toys Pack Sensory Stress Relief Squishies Soft & Stretchy Fidget Toys for Anxiety Relief Party Favors Squishy Butter

reviews.name: Kamy
reviews.title: literally the best
reviews.body: it’s so squishy and it’s just a little bit sticky but I love that part and it smells so good it smells like super sweet and it’s so much fun to play with but MAKE SURE U DON’T WASH IT WITH WATER it kinda of made it rip a little so just don’t wash it. overall this is one of my favorites

reviews.name: M. Hart
reviews.title: Lovely squeeze
reviews.body: These butter sticks are excellent quality. They are pleasing to squeeze, smooth outer material, not plasticy.  They bounce back nicely.  No smell at all !  They appear real too! I have been fooled when they are sitting on my counter !

reviews.name: tgr74
reviews.title: When in doubt. Make art!
reviews.body: Love it! Looks so real. Feels really cool and smells like buttah!  I used it to make a funny art installation for my coffee table.  Can’t wait to see people interact with it and ask me why I have butter on my table.

reviews.name: Elm
reviews.title: STRESSFUL not stress relief
reviews.body: The smell is overpowering. I think it's supposed to be buttered popcorn, but it smells  like burnt popcorn. The surface texture is so sticky it feels gross to the touch so that I don't even want to put my hands on it to squish it. I tried rinsing it out several times  to get rid of  the nasty smell & texture but after wringing out the water so many times it now has holes in it so it is not durable at all. Overall it is STRESSFUL not stress relief.
